footer_tagline: Quality products, delivered to your door.
products_meta_description: Browse the full GYEON catalog. Search by name, filter by category and price, and shop with confidence.
wishlist_login_prompt: Sign in to sync your wishlist across devices.
free_shipping_remaining: Spend {amount} more to unlock free shipping
loyalty_balance_hint: Earned from completed orders. Talk to support to redeem.
home_meta_description: GYEON — quality products delivered to your door. Discover our latest arrivals and bestsellers.
products_category_empty: No products in this category yet.
cart_add_failed: Could not add to cart. Please try again.
cart_pending_order_banner: You have an unpaid order {orderNumber} awaiting payment.
checkout_logged_in_hint: Signed in as {email} (you can adjust the details below if needed).
checkout_login_hint_text: to use saved addresses and order history.
checkout_delivery_need_address: Please fill in your shipping address first.
checkout_delivery_quote_warning: ⚠ {error} — checkout will continue with free shipping; please contact the store to confirm delivery.
checkout_delivery_no_options: No delivery options for this address. Checkout will continue with free shipping.
checkout_logistics_not_configured: Default courier not configured — please contact the store before ordering.
checkout_logistics_sf_locker_notice: 【⚠️ SF Express Smart Locker Pickup Notice】SF Express has revamped its notification system and now sends the pickup code mainly through the SF Express mobile App — SMS text messages are no longer sent. Please keep an eye on the SF App to avoid overdue-parcel penalty charges.
checkout_tc_text_pre: I have read and agree to the website's
checkout_select_payment_hint: Please select a payment method to continue
bank_transfer_intro: Thank you for your order. It will be held until we confirm receipt of payment before processing continues.
bank_transfer_whatsapp_instruction: After payment, please screenshot the transfer record and send it via WhatsApp to {number}
bank_transfer_on_hold_body: Your order is on hold. Please complete the bank transfer using the details below.
secure_payment_subtitle: GYEON HK never sees or stores your full card number.
checkout_payment_hint_new: Once the form above is complete, click "Continue to payment" to enter your card details.
checkout_no_payment_setup: Payment is not configured. Please contact the store.
checkout_payment_start_failed: Could not start payment. Please try again.
checkout_payment_failed_heading: Payment incomplete — your order is reserved
checkout_payment_failed_body: You have not been charged. Please try again above, or complete payment later using the link below.
checkout_quote_failed: Failed to get a shipping quote.
checkout_success_body: Your order {orderNumber} has been placed successfully.
checkout_success_email_sent: A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.
pickup_no_results: No pickup points match your filter.
account_login_reset_success: Password updated. Please sign in with your new password.
account_login_forgot_sent: If that email is registered, a password reset link has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox.
account_login_error_oauth: Sign-in with that provider didn't complete. Please try again, or use your email and password.
account_login_error_inactive: This account is inactive. Please contact us for help.
account_forgot_body: Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a password reset link.
account_password_error_mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
account_password_error_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
account_password_error_generic: Could not update password. Please try again.
purchased_intro: Everything you've bought, ready to re-order.
account_order_no_messages: No messages yet. Send one below if you have a question about this order.
account_order_msg_send_label: Send a message to the store
account_order_msg_placeholder: Ask a question or share an update about this order
password_reset_subheading: Enter a new password to continue using your GYEON account.
password_reset_invalid_link: This link is invalid or has expired. Please contact support or request a new link.
password_setup_subheading: Set a password to activate your account so you can review orders later.
password_setup_invalid_link: This link is invalid or is missing an identifier. Please click the link in your order confirmation email again.
blog_subheading: Stories, updates and ideas from the GYEON team.
blog_empty: No posts yet — check back soon.
blog_category_empty: No posts in this category yet — check back soon.
maintenance_body: We're making some improvements and will be back shortly.
pay_select_payment_hint: Please select a payment method to continue
pay_tc_text_pre: I have read and agree to the website's
pay_load_failed: Could not load the payment form
pay_payment_not_setup: Payment is not configured. Please contact the store.
admin_login_subtitle: Sign in to manage your store
dashboard_greeting_sub: Here's what's happening in your store.
admin_products_search_placeholder: Search by name, slug or PRD-…
admin_categories_delete_body: "{name}" will be removed. Products using this category will be unassigned.
admin_category_roles_description: Restrict which roles can see, list, and purchase from each category. Uncheck a box to block. View off blocks everything for that role. List off keeps the category as a "private link" — PDP works but it disappears from listings, search and nav. Purchase off blocks add-to-cart while keeping the category browsable. Categories not shown here (or with every box checked) are fully open to that role by default.
admin_category_roles_empty_pre: No categories yet. Create one under
admin_orders_delete_disabled_hint: Only cancelled or refunded orders can be deleted — cancel or refund it first
admin_orders_delete_body_pre: Are you sure you want to delete order
admin_orders_empty_no_match_hint: Try a different status, date range or search term.
admin_orders_select_all_aria: Select all orders on this page
admin_orders_batch_none_body: None of the selected orders could produce a receipt.
admin_orders_batch_waybills_none_body: None of the selected orders had an SF waybill to download.
admin_order_create_customer_required: Please choose or enter customer details.
admin_order_create_items_empty_hint: Search and add products to begin.
admin_order_create_items_required: Please add at least one product.
admin_order_create_address_required: Please choose or enter a shipping address.
admin_order_create_shipping_free_hint: Free-shipping threshold met. Default fee HK$0.
admin_order_create_shipping_default_hint: Below free-shipping threshold. Default fee HK$0 (pay on delivery).
admin_order_create_summary_send_payment_: Email Stripe payment link to customer after create
Customer has no email — payment link cannot be sent.
admin_order_create_error_default: Failed to create order. Please try again.
admin_order_ship_waybill_warning: This order already has a waybill — saving will re-sync the address to the courier and regenerate the label if it has not yet been picked up.
admin_order_shipment_legacy_intro: This order pre-dates ShipAny enablement and has no carrier selected. Pick one to create a shipment.
admin_order_reply_placeholder: Customer will receive this by email
admin_order_refund_modal_warning: This calls Stripe to refund the customer. The action is irreversible.
admin_customers_search_placeholder: Search by name, email or phone…
admin_customers_empty_no_match_hint: Try a different name, email or phone fragment.
admin_customers_empty_hint: Customers will appear here after they register.
admin_customer_reset_modal_body_pre: Send a reset password email to
admin_customer_reset_modal_body_post: ? The link will expire in 24 hours.
admin_product_edit_help_video_id: 11-character YouTube video ID (e.g. IuUvIgc_9UA). Rendered as the hero embed below the specs grid.
admin_product_edit_help_banner_1: Shown to the left of the Content tab text on desktop, above the text on mobile.
admin_product_edit_help_banner_2: Shown to the left of the How-to-Use tab text on desktop, above the text on mobile.
admin_product_edit_help_media_strip: Four landscape images displayed in order above the “Complete Set” section.
admin_single_media_picker_dropzone: Drag & drop an image here, or click to browse
admin_product_edit_kind_warning_body_wit: Saving this change will permanently delete all bundle component settings and the auto-created variant ({count} component). Past orders are not affected.
Saving this change will permanently delete all bundle component settings and the auto-created variant ({count} components). Past orders are not affected.
admin_product_edit_kind_warning_body_no_: Saving this change will permanently delete all bundle component settings and the auto-created variant. Past orders are not affected.
admin_product_edit_variants_empty: No variants yet. Add one to set pricing and stock.
admin_product_edit_bundle_pricing_subtit: Set the price for this bundle. Stock is derived automatically from components.
admin_product_edit_bundle_pricing_hint_n: Saved together with the product when you click Create Product.
admin_product_edit_bundle_pricing_hint_e: Pricing changes will be saved when you click Save Changes at the bottom of the page.
admin_product_edit_bundle_contents_subti: Components included in this bundle. Stock is derived as the minimum of floor(component_stock / quantity).
admin_product_edit_bundle_contents_empty: No components yet. Add some below.
admin_product_edit_bundle_contents_hint_: Components will be saved together with the product when you click Create Product.
Component changes will be saved when you click Save Changes at the bottom of the page.
admin_product_edit_promo_subtitle: Bundle products to surface inside the taobao-layout PDP modal under "Promo Bundles". Only products of type "Bundle" appear in the picker. Drag rows to reorder.
admin_product_edit_upsells_subtitle: Products to recommend instead of this one (alternatives / upgrades), shown on its product page above the frequently-bought-together row. Drag rows to reorder. A later WooCommerce import overwrites this list.
admin_product_edit_crosssells_subtitle: Complementary products promoted in the cart when this product is in it. Drag rows to reorder. A later WooCommerce import overwrites this list.
admin_product_edit_related_csv_hint: Search to add (pick a variant), or import a name,variant CSV. Single products or bundles.
admin_product_edit_actions_uploading_wai: Waiting for media upload to complete…
admin_product_edit_add_variant_name_plac: Optional human-readable label, e.g. Navy / Medium
admin_product_edit_add_variant_no_media: No images in media library yet.
admin_product_edit_add_variant_duplicate: A pending variant with SKU '{sku}' already exists.
admin_product_edit_stock_hint: Positive to add stock, negative to remove.
admin_product_edit_add_media_dropzone: Drag & drop images or videos here, or click to browse
admin_product_edit_add_media_accepted: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, MP4, or WebM
admin_product_edit_add_media_rejected_bo: Only JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF images and MP4 or WebM videos are accepted.
admin_product_edit_add_media_no_media: No media in the library yet.
admin_product_edit_kind_modal_item_varia: The auto-created BUNDLE-XXX variant (along with its pricing)
admin_product_edit_kind_modal_footer: Past orders are not affected (snapshots are kept). The bundle will be removed automatically from any active carts.
admin_cms_pages_search_placeholder: Search by title, slug or PG-…
admin_cms_page_edit_content_placeholder: Write your page content in Markdown...
admin_cms_page_edit_meta_title_placehold: Overrides page title in search results
admin_cms_page_edit_meta_desc_placeholde: Short description shown in search results (max ~160 chars)
admin_cms_page_edit_show_title_hint: When off, the storefront won't render the page <h1> heading (still used in navigation and SEO).
admin_cms_page_edit_content_padded_hint: Adds top and bottom padding around the page content. Turn off for full-bleed layouts (hero / banner) that need to reach the header and footer edges.
admin_cms_posts_search_placeholder: Search by title, excerpt, slug or POST-…
admin_cms_post_categories_delete_body: "{name}" will be removed. Posts using this category will be unassigned.
admin_cms_navigation_hide_for_roles_hint: Unchecked roles still see this item. Anonymous visitors are treated as Customer.
admin_settings_fbt_excluded_subtitle: Products linked to any of these categories are filtered out of all three Frequently-Bought-Together pools (co-purchase, bestsellers, slow-movers).
admin_cms_navigation_remove_body_post: " will be removed from this menu.
admin_cms_navigation_remove_warns_childr: Its sub-links will also be removed.
admin_media_link_modal_save_failed: Failed to save link. Please check the URL and try again.
admin_media_link_modal_streaming_detecte: video detected — thumbnail will be extracted automatically
admin_media_link_modal_autoplay_hint: Force autoplay, muted, loop wherever the video is shown.
admin_media_link_modal_fit_hint: How the video sizes inside its container.
admin_media_edit_autoplay_hint: Force autoplay, muted, loop wherever the video is shown.
admin_media_edit_fit_hint: How the video sizes inside its container.
admin_media_empty_hint: Drop files anywhere, click Upload, or Add Link to get started.
admin_users_password_changed: Password updated for {name}. All their sessions have been revoked.
admin_settings_test_email_failure_defaul: Check your SMTP settings and save them first.
admin_settings_maintenance_warning: ⚠ Site is in maintenance mode — non-admin visitors are redirected to the maintenance page.
admin_settings_favicon_subtitle: Pick an image from the Media library. Empty uses the bundled default icon.
admin_settings_company_logo_subtitle: Pick an image from the Media library to show in the storefront header. Empty uses the text logo.
admin_settings_company_logo_footer_subti: Pick an image from the Media library to show in the storefront footer. Empty uses the text logo.
admin_settings_company_info_subtitle: Address, phone and registration shown on the PDF receipt header.
admin_settings_social_media_help: Manage the social-media icons shown on the right side of the storefront footer. Each entry opens its URL in a new tab.
admin_settings_social_media_custom_svg_h: Paste only the path d-attribute string. Drawn on a 24×24 viewBox in currentColor.
admin_media_picker_empty: No media files yet. Upload one from the Media page first.
admin_settings_storefront_lang_subtitle: Default language used by the public storefront when a visitor has not chosen one yet.
admin_settings_homepage_subtitle: Choose what visitors see at the storefront root (/). Pick a published Page to replace the default Home template.
admin_settings_site_notice_subtitle: Text displayed in the announcement strip above the storefront header. Leave empty to hide the strip.
admin_settings_shipping_notice_subtitle: Second notice strip below the Site Notice. Auto-shows when the free-shipping threshold is enabled in the Logistics tab; switches text based on the customer's cart subtotal.
admin_settings_shipping_notice_eligible_: When cart subtotal reaches the threshold
shop_shipping_notice_threshold: Orders over HK${amount} ship free — dispatched the next business day after order.
shop_shipping_notice_eligible: Your order ships free — dispatched the next business day after order.
admin_settings_website_slogan_subtitle: Tagline shown under the logo in the storefront footer. Leave blank to hide it.
admin_settings_website_slogan_placeholde: e.g. Quality products, delivered to your door.
admin_settings_pdp_sections_subtitle: Show or hide presentation blocks on the public product detail page.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_show_specs_strip: The 4-column dark-blue band below the buy box (size options, availability, coverage, durability).
admin_settings_desc_pdp_show_complete_se: The "相關產品" related-products bundle composer below the content tabs.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_show_fbt: The "其他客人都會買埋呢啲" bundle composer fed by real co-purchase data.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_show_stock_count: On: show "13 units in stock" with the exact quantity. Off: show a generic "In stock" indicator without revealing the number.
admin_settings_pdp_complete_set_subtitle: Override the kicker and heading shown above the complete-set bundle composer. Leave blank to use the default translations.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_complete_set_pre: On: every item is checked when the page loads. Off: all start unchecked and the customer opts in.
admin_settings_pdp_fbt_subtitle: Override the kicker and heading shown above the frequently-bought-together composer. Leave blank to use the default translations.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_fbt_preselect_al: On: every item is checked when the page loads. Off: all start unchecked and the customer opts in.
admin_settings_pdp_fbt_heading_placehold: Default: 其他客人都會買埋呢啲
admin_settings_pdp_fbt_layout_subtitle: Choose how the frequently-bought-together section is displayed.
admin_settings_pdp_complete_set_layout_s: Choose how the related-products section is displayed.
admin_settings_pdp_suggestions_layout_hi: Amazon-style bundle: selectable mini-cards with a running total and one "Add all" button.
Up-sells grid: a simple product grid where each card has its own quick-add button.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_show_upsells: The WooCommerce up-sells grid — alternative products imported from WooCommerce and shown on the product page. Separate from frequently-bought-together.
admin_settings_pdp_upsells_subtitle: Override the kicker and heading shown above the up-sells grid. Leave blank to use the default translations.
admin_settings_pdp_upsells_heading_place: Default: 你可能仲鍾意呢啲
admin_settings_pdp_upsells_layout_subtit: How the up-sells show on the product page — a full-width grid below the product, or a compact mini list in the right column beside it.
admin_settings_pdp_upsells_layout_hint_n: Cards in a full-width grid below the product.
admin_settings_pdp_upsells_layout_hint_m: Compact horizontal cards (120×120 image) stacked in the right column, with no kicker line.
admin_settings_pdp_layout_subtitle: Choose how the Content / How to Use / Compatible Surfaces block renders on the product detail page.
admin_settings_account_page_layout_subti: Choose how the customer account pages are arranged.
admin_settings_account_page_layout_hint_: Sidebar menu beside the content (the original layout).
A clean, single-column layout with top tabs that fits any screen size.
admin_settings_product_custom_order_dir_: Direction for the manual order number (自訂次序) in category listings and the [products] shortcode.
Products with a custom order show smallest number first (1, 2, 3…). Products without a custom order follow, newest first.
Products with a custom order show largest number first. Products without a custom order follow, newest first.
admin_settings_checkout_page_layout_subt: Choose how the customer checkout page is arranged.
admin_settings_checkout_page_layout_hint: The current multi-section layout (the original layout).
A guided step-by-step layout with a single pay button that fits any screen size.
admin_settings_cart_page_layout_subtitle: Choose how the shopping cart page is arranged.
admin_settings_cart_page_layout_hint_cla: The current two-column layout (the original layout).
admin_settings_cart_page_layout_hint_mod: A clean single-column, receipt-style layout that fits any screen size.
admin_settings_cart_cross_sells_subtitle: Complementary products promoted in the cart based on its contents (WooCommerce cross-sells, imported from WooCommerce).
admin_settings_desc_cart_show_cross_sell: On: show the cross-sells section above "recently viewed" when the cart's products have cross-sells. Off: hide it.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_navlist_show_nav: On: show the anchor nav bar above the sections so customers can jump between them. Off: sections still stack in order, just without the top nav bar.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_navlist_show_tit: On: show the heading above each section (Content / How to Use / Compatible Surfaces). Off: show only the section content, without titles.
admin_settings_hidden_products_subtitle: Hiding categories from the public catalog is now per-role. Use the category-roles matrix to toggle the "List" column off for a given role — that category becomes a private link for them (PDP still resolves) but disappears from listings, search and nav.
admin_settings_shipping_subtitle: Countries available at checkout (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes).
admin_settings_payment_subtitle: Configure Stripe credentials and the runtime mode used for new orders.
admin_settings_payment_mode_live_hint: Live — real charges will be made.
admin_settings_payment_country_hint: Country your Stripe account is registered in. Drives the default country shown in the payment address fields.
admin_settings_payment_webhook_hint_mid: in Stripe Dashboard, then paste the
admin_settings_bank_transfer_subtitle: Offline payment shown to installer (施工店) customers, who can only pay by bank transfer. Regular customers and guests always pay by Stripe.
admin_settings_automation_subtitle: Toggle whether paid orders should automatically create a ShipAny shipment.
admin_settings_automation_auto_shipany_h: When enabled, every order that flips to paid enqueues a Shipany shipment in the background queue. The ShipAny API response is written as a system message on the order. Requires ShipAny to be configured above.
admin_settings_shipany_subtitle_pre: Live shipping rates at checkout, label printing, pickup booking and tracking via
admin_settings_shipany_api_key_hint: From portal.shipany.io → Settings. Env-prefixed keys (SHIPANYDEV / SHIPANYSBX1 / SHIPANYDEMO) are auto-routed to the right subdomain.
admin_settings_shipany_webhook_hint_pre: ShipAny mostly delivers tracking via polling. If your account supports push callbacks, register
admin_settings_shipany_webhook_hint_post: and paste the HMAC secret here.
admin_settings_shipany_pickup_subtitle: Sender address used for rate quoting and waybill generation. Falls back to merchant info from the portal when blank.
admin_settings_shipany_courier_load_fail: Couldn't load courier list — check credentials and Refresh.
admin_settings_shipany_paid_by_receiver_: Bill the recipient instead of the merchant.
admin_settings_shipany_self_drop_off_hin: Drop parcels at the courier counter instead of door pickup.
admin_settings_shipany_show_courier_trac: Surface the courier-side tracking number to customers.
admin_settings_email_subtitle: Used to send order confirmation emails. Gmail: enable 2FA → create an App Password at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords.
admin_settings_email_enabled_hint: Master switch for outgoing email. When off, transactional and notification emails are skipped (the Test Email button still works so you can validate the connection).
admin_settings_email_resend_api_key_hint: Create one at resend.com/api-keys. The From address must be on a domain verified in Resend.
admin_settings_email_smtp_password_hint: Use a Google App Password — not your account password.
admin_settings_email_public_base_url_hin: Used to build links inside transactional emails.
admin_settings_email_admin_alert_hint: Receives low-stock and other admin alerts. Falls back to the From address when empty.
admin_settings_email_smtp_log_retention_: Days to retain email log rows before pruning. Set 0 to keep forever.
admin_settings_email_daily_limit_hint: Max emails sent in a rolling 24h window before deferring. Keep below your provider's daily cap. Set 0 to disable.
admin_settings_email_rate_per_minute_hin: Max emails sent per minute — suits Gmail SMTP's burst caps. Set 0 to disable.
admin_settings_email_rate_per_second_hin: Max emails sent per second — suits Resend's rate limit (default ~2/s). Runs alongside the per-minute limit. Set 0 to disable.
admin_settings_low_stock_subtitle: Email the admin alert recipient when a variant crosses its low-stock threshold.
admin_settings_low_stock_alerts_hint: Disable to silence all low-stock notifications.
admin_settings_low_stock_default_hint: Used when a variant has no per-variant override.
admin_settings_tax_subtitle: Apply a single global tax rate at checkout. Disabled by default.
admin_settings_tax_rate_hint: Percentage applied to the discounted subtotal.
admin_settings_tax_inclusive_hint: When ON, displayed prices include tax (back-calculated). When OFF, tax is added on top.
admin_settings_loyalty_subtitle: Reward customers with points earned on purchases.
admin_settings_abandoned_subtitle: Email logged-in customers when their cart has been idle past the threshold. Trigger from your own cron via POST /api/v1/admin/abandoned-cart/run.
admin_settings_abandoned_threshold_hint: How long a cart must be idle before a reminder is sent. One reminder per cart.
admin_settings_pending_expiry_subtitle: Automatically cancel and restock pending orders left unpaid past the threshold. A background sweep runs every few minutes; you can also trigger it now.
admin_settings_pending_expiry_card_hint: Hours before an unpaid card order is cancelled and its stock released. 0 = disabled (recommended: 24).
admin_settings_pending_expiry_bank_hint: Longer window for bank-transfer orders, which take days to clear. 0 = disabled (recommended: 168).
admin_settings_test_email_modal_subtitle: Sends a test email using your current saved SMTP settings.
admin_settings_cloudflare_purge_modal_su: This drops every edge-cached asset for this zone. Visitors may experience a brief slowdown while the cache rebuilds.
admin_settings_cloudflare_purge_success_: All cached assets have been dropped for this zone.
admin_settings_cloudflare_purge_failure_: Check your Cloudflare credentials and save them first.
admin_settings_recaptcha_subtitle_pre: Spam protection for contact forms. Get keys at
admin_settings_recaptcha_min_score_hint: Submissions scoring below this are rejected. 0.5 is a sensible starting point.
admin_settings_oauth_subtitle: Let customers sign in with Google or Apple. A new customer is created on first sign-in, or linked to an existing account when the verified email matches.
admin_settings_oauth_redirect_hint: Register these callback URLs with the provider:
admin_settings_free_shipping_threshold_s: When enabled, orders that reach the threshold ship free; below it, customers pay SF Express on delivery.
admin_settings_free_shipping_threshold_d: Disabled: every shipment is booked as SF freight-collect (paid by receiver).
admin_settings_free_shipping_threshold_i: Independent threshold for installer (施工店) customers. When disabled, installers always pay SF freight-collect — no fallback to the default threshold.
Disabled: installer orders are always booked as SF freight-collect, regardless of the default threshold.
admin_settings_desc_free_shipping_thresh: Order subtotal (HKD) at or above which shipping is free for installer (施工店) customers. 0 = disabled.
admin_settings_free_shipping_threshold_i: Independent threshold for installer_v2 (施工店_v2) customers. When disabled, they always pay SF freight-collect — no fallback to the default threshold.
Disabled: installer_v2 orders are always booked as SF freight-collect, regardless of the default threshold.
admin_settings_desc_free_shipping_thresh: Order subtotal (HKD) at or above which shipping is free for installer_v2 (施工店_v2) customers. 0 = disabled.
admin_settings_shipany_paid_by_receiver_: Automatically on because the free-shipping threshold is disabled.
Computed per order: free when the cart subtotal reaches the free-shipping threshold; otherwise paid by receiver.
admin_settings_desc_pdp_taobao_layout: When true, the storefront product detail page uses the taobao-style add-to-cart modal site-wide. Each product can override this setting individually.
admin_settings_desc_form_upload_hard_cap: Maximum size in megabytes for file uploads via contact / custom forms. Applies as a hard limit regardless of per-form settings.
admin_settings_desc_free_shipping_thresh: Order subtotal (HKD) at or above which shipping is free. 0 = disabled.
admin_settings_desc_ga4_measurement_id: Google Analytics 4 measurement ID (e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX). Empty disables GA4.
admin_settings_desc_loyalty_enabled: Master switch for the loyalty program (P3 #24).
admin_settings_desc_loyalty_points_per_h: Points earned per HK$1 of paid order subtotal (post-discount).
admin_settings_desc_loyalty_redeem_rate_: Points needed to redeem HK$1. Reserved for future checkout integration.
admin_settings_desc_meta_pixel_id: Meta (Facebook) Pixel ID. Empty disables Meta Pixel.
admin_settings_desc_cache_ttl_shop: Product & category cache TTL in seconds (default: 300)
admin_settings_desc_cache_ttl_cms: CMS pages & posts cache TTL in seconds (default: 300)
admin_settings_desc_admin_token_ttl_hour: How long an admin stays logged in, in hours (default: 24). Applies to new logins only.
admin_settings_desc_customer_token_ttl_h: How long a customer stays logged in, in hours (default: 720 = 30 days). Applies to new logins only.
admin_settings_desc_cloudflare_zone_id: Cloudflare Zone ID used to purge cached uploads on delete
admin_settings_desc_cloudflare_api_token: Cloudflare API Token used to purge cached uploads on delete
admin_settings_desc_upload_max_image_mb: Maximum image upload size in megabytes
admin_settings_desc_upload_max_video_mb: Maximum video upload size in megabytes
admin_settings_desc_maintenance_mode: When true, non-admin visitors are redirected to the maintenance page
admin_settings_desc_mcp_enabled: Allow AI agents to connect to this store via MCP
admin_settings_desc_blog_enabled: When off, /blog pages return 404 and blog links are hidden from the storefront. Admin can still manage posts.
admin_settings_desc_pwa_enabled: When off, the storefront omits the web app manifest, iOS home-screen meta tags, and unregisters the service worker. Default on.
admin_import_orders_intro: Pulls WooCommerce orders matching the selected status filter (default: all statuses), keyed by WC order ID. Re-runs are idempotent — already-imported orders are updated in place; line items are wiped and re-inserted. Inventory is never decremented (orders are historical). Local order numbers are freshly generated; the WC order ID is preserved alongside.
admin_import_orders_confirm_full: All WooCommerce orders will be imported into GYEON. Existing rows (matched by WC order ID) are updated in place; line items are wiped and re-inserted from the WC payload. Inventory is left untouched.
admin_import_orders_confirm_limited: Up to {limit} WooCommerce order(s) will be imported into GYEON. Existing rows are updated in place; inventory is left untouched.
admin_import_customers_intro: Pulls every WooCommerce customer (and admin-role users) into GYEON, keyed by WC customer ID. Email-only fallback adopts manually-created storefront accounts. Re-running is safe — already-imported rows are updated in place. Passwords are never migrated; customers must use the storefront password-reset flow.
admin_import_customers_confirm_full: All WooCommerce customers will be imported into GYEON. Existing rows (matched by WC ID or email) are updated in place; addresses on already-imported customers are left untouched.
admin_import_customers_confirm_limited: Up to {limit} WooCommerce customer(s) will be imported into GYEON. Existing rows are updated in place; addresses on already-imported customers are left untouched.
admin_import_customers_fake_filter_note: Suspected fake accounts are filtered out automatically — this applies to all three modes below. An account that has never ordered and has no name or phone is treated as a bot signup: it is not imported and receives no email, and any matching account already in GYEON (one with no orders, no password, and no linked login) is removed.
admin_import_customers_setup_email_intro: Choose who receives the setup-password email after import. Requires SMTP configured and the email master switch on.
admin_import_customers_setup_email_skip_: Just import the data — no email is sent. Customers imported under this mode become eligible the next time you run "Email customers without password".
admin_import_customers_setup_email_passw: Send the setup-password email only to imported customers who haven't set a password yet AND haven't already received the email. Idempotent — re-running won't re-spam.
admin_import_customers_setup_email_force: Send the setup-password email to every imported customer, ignoring password and prior-email state. For re-onboarding campaigns or post-incident resets.
admin_import_subtitle: Import items from a WooCommerce store via REST API.
admin_import_test_failed_missing_creds: Please fill in the URL, Consumer Key and Consumer Secret first.
admin_import_test_failed_check_keys: Please check the URL and API keys.
admin_import_test_failed_timeout: Connection timed out or network error.
admin_import_no_creds_body: Please configure WooCommerce credentials in Import Settings first.
admin_import_confirm_upsert_full: WooCommerce data will be used to update existing products and add any missing ones. Products deleted on the WC side will be removed from GYEON as well; admin-created products, translations, and images are not affected. Continue?
admin_import_confirm_upsert_limited: WooCommerce data will be used to update existing products and add any missing ones. Only the first {limit} products will be processed; products deleted on the WC side will not be cleaned up. Admin-created products, translations, and images are not affected. Continue?
admin_import_confirm_replace_full: All previously imported WooCommerce products (including translations, variants, and images) will be deleted, then re-imported from WooCommerce. Admin-created products are kept. This action cannot be undone — continue?
admin_import_confirm_replace_limited: All previously imported WooCommerce products (including translations, variants, and images) will be deleted, then the first {limit} products will be re-imported from WooCommerce. Admin-created products are kept. This action cannot be undone — continue?
admin_import_confirm_upsert_single: WooCommerce product #{id} will be fetched and used to update the matching GYEON product (or insert it if missing). Other products, translations, and images are not affected. Continue?
admin_import_confirm_replace_single: All previously imported WooCommerce products (including translations, variants, and images) will be deleted, then only product #{id} will be re-imported from WooCommerce. Admin-created products are kept. This action cannot be undone — continue?
admin_import_run_failed_default: Could not connect to WooCommerce — check the URL and API keys.
admin_import_run_timeout: Connection timed out — check that the WooCommerce URL is correct.
admin_import_stream_failed_default: Import failed. Please try again later.
admin_import_stream_dropped: The import connection dropped — check the server logs and re-run.
admin_import_run_error: An error occurred during the import. Please try again later.
admin_import_safe_to_leave: This import runs on the server — you can safely leave this page and return later to check progress.
admin_import_product_type_hint: Choose what to import. Run "Products" first so any bundle components exist before running "Bundle Products".
admin_import_product_type_bundle_warning: ⚠ Bundle components are matched by WooCommerce product ID — components missing in GYEON will be skipped. Run "Products" first if needed.
admin_import_image_mode_hint: Process images: download new ones and reuse already-downloaded ones (default). Skip images: leave images untouched — fastest, for price / stock / text-only updates.
admin_import_image_mode_skip_note: ⚠ Images are left untouched — existing product photos and banners are kept as-is, and no new images are downloaded.
admin_import_queued_hint: Will start automatically once the imports ahead of it finish. This runs on the server — you can safely leave this page.
admin_import_limit_hint: Empty / 0 = import everything; N = import only the first N products (with their variants). Useful for testing.
admin_import_limit_warning: ⚠ When a limit is set, products deleted on the WC side will not be cleaned up (to avoid removing entries the limited scan didn't see).
admin_import_product_id_hint: Optional. Enter a single WC product ID to import only that product (with its variants). Leave empty to import everything (or use Quantity limit above). The Quantity limit is ignored when an ID is set.
admin_import_product_id_warning: ⚠ Only this single product will be imported. Products deleted on the WC side will not be cleaned up.
admin_import_customer_id_hint: Optional. Enter a single WC user (customer) ID to import only that customer. Leave empty to import everything (or use Quantity limit above). The Quantity limit is ignored when an ID is set.
admin_import_customer_id_warning: ⚠ Only this single customer will be imported / updated.
admin_import_mode_upsert_desc: Use WooCommerce as the source of truth for stock, price, weight, etc.; preserves admin translations, manually uploaded images, and admin-created products. Products deleted on the WC side are removed from GYEON as well.
admin_import_mode_replace_title: Re-import (delete old WC products, then reload)
admin_import_mode_replace_desc: First delete all previously WC-imported products (including their translations and images), then re-import a fresh copy. Admin-created products are kept.
admin_import_run_hint: The system tests the connection first and only starts the import once the test passes.
admin_discounts_subtitle: Manage automatic campaigns and customer-entered coupon codes.
admin_discounts_roles_required: Select at least one account type
storefront_coupon_wrong_role: This coupon is not valid for your account
admin_discounts_max_order_below_min: Maximum must be greater than or equal to minimum
admin_redirects_subtitle: Send traffic from old URLs to new ones with 301 or 302 redirects.
admin_redirects_help_from: Must start with /. Exact match — query strings are ignored.
admin_redirects_help_from_wildcard: Must start with / and end with /*. Captures everything after the prefix. Example: /product-category/*
admin_redirects_help_to_wildcard: End with /* to keep the captured suffix (/products/category/*), or use a fixed path to collapse every match to one URL.
admin_redirects_help_exact_body: Sends one specific URL to another. Query strings are ignored.
admin_redirects_help_wild_preserve_body: End both paths with /* to forward everything under the prefix to the matching path on the other side.
admin_redirects_help_wild_drop_body: Use /* on the left and a plain path on the right to funnel every URL under the prefix to one destination.
admin_redirects_help_codes_body: 301 is a permanent move — browsers and search engines cache it for a long time, so use it once the new URL is final. 302 is temporary — use it during migrations or A/B tests where you may want to undo it.
admin_audit_log_subtitle: Every high-sensitivity admin action with the actor and a JSON snapshot of what changed.
admin_audit_log_empty: No audit entries yet — perform an admin action to see one here.
admin_smtp_log_subtitle: Every outbound email attempt — rendered subject and body, delivery status, and one-click resend.
admin_smtp_log_empty: No emails sent yet — outgoing mail will appear here as it's queued.
admin_queue_jobs_subtitle: Background jobs draining through the in-process worker. Inspect failures or retry dead jobs.
admin_queue_jobs_empty: No jobs yet — they appear here as the worker processes queue rows.
admin_stock_history_subtitle: Every stock-in / stock-out event across all variants, with the actor and source.
admin_stock_history_empty: No stock movements match your filters.
admin_product_stock_history_subtitle: Every stock change across all variants of this product.
admin_stock_mutations_search_placeholder: Search MUT-#, SKU or product name
admin_stock_mutations_empty_no_filters: No stock mutations yet. Try creating one.
admin_stock_mutations_empty_with_filters: No stock mutations match. Try clearing filters.
admin_stock_mutations_confirm_execute: Execute {id}? Once executed it cannot be undone or modified.
admin_stock_mutations_confirm_change_typ: Changing direction will clear all line items. Continue?
admin_stock_mutations_delete_modal_body: This cannot be undone. Only drafts can be deleted; executed mutations are immutable.
admin_stock_mutations_execute_modal_body: Once executed it cannot be undone or modified.
admin_stock_mutations_no_items_body: Add at least one variant before saving.
admin_stock_mutations_duplicate_variant_: The same variant cannot appear twice in one mutation.
admin_stock_mutations_insufficient_stock: Saved as draft. See the conflicts list below.
admin_stock_mutations_direction_hint_in: Each line's quantity will be added to stock.
admin_stock_mutations_direction_hint_out: Each line's quantity will be subtracted from stock. Execution is rejected if any variant runs short.
admin_stock_mutations_conflict_hint: Adjust the quantity or restock the variant before executing again.
admin_stock_mutations_table_empty_hint: Use the search above to add variants.
admin_email_templates_subtitle: Override the wording for transactional emails. Reset any time to fall back to the built-in default.
admin_email_templates_variables_hint: Insert any variable below using Go template syntax — wrap it in double curly braces.
admin_forms_delete_body: This will permanently delete the form and all its submissions. This cannot be undone.
admin_forms_markup_hint: HTML is rendered as-is; each [tag] is replaced by its input. Write your own labels and layout around the tags.
admin_forms_reply_field_hint: Name of the email field that carries the submitter's address.
